PreToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\-\-no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not skip git hooks (--no-verify). Fix the underlying issue instead.' >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'push.*--force.*main|push.*-f.*main'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never force push to main.' >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0

PreToolUse.description: Block bash commands containing hardcoded secrets
PreToolUse.command: CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36})'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Possible hardcoded secret in bash command. Use environment variables or the Settings tab.' >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0

PreToolUse.description: Block writing hardcoded secrets into source files
PreToolUse.command: CONTENT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('content','') or d.get('new_string',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '(sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36})'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Possible hardcoded secret in file content. Use environment variables or the Settings tab.' >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse.command: if [ -f index.html ]; then LINES=$(wc -l < index.html); if [ "$LINES" -gt 4500 ]; then echo "WARNING: index.html is $LINES lines. Consider extracting into modules." >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse.description: Warn when innerHTML is used without the esc() helper
PostToolUse.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(html|js)$'; then CONTENT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('content','') or d.get('new_string',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'innerHTML' && ! echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qP 'innerHTML.*esc\('; then echo "WARNING: innerHTML usage detected — verify esc() is used for any dynamic content in $FILE" >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse.description: Remind to sync Pine Script when indicator logic changes
PostToolUse.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); CONTENT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('content','') or d.get('new_string',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.pine$'; then echo "REMINDER [pine-script-update]: .pine file edited — update the matching downloadIndicator()/downloadOverlayIndicator() string in index.html" >&2; fi; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'runIndicators|computeIndicatorsForBars|calcRSI|bullDiv|bearDiv|longEntry|shortEntry'; then echo "REMINDER [indicator-parity]: Indicator logic changed — verify order_flow_elite.pine matches and run: node tests/indicators.test.js" >&2; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse.description: Detect console.log/console.error left in JS code (use logAlert instead)
PostToolUse.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); CONTENT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('content','') or d.get('new_string',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(html|js)$'; then if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'console\.(log|error|warn)\('; then echo "WARNING [code-quality]: console.log/error/warn detected in $FILE — use logAlert() instead per project coding rules" >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse.description: Detect silent catch blocks missing logAlert()
PostToolUse.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); CONTENT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('content','') or d.get('new_string',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(html|js)$'; then if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'catch\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\{\s*\}'; then echo "WARNING [silent-failure]: Empty catch block detected in $FILE — always call logAlert() with error context" >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse.description: After running indicator tests, surface any failures prominently
PostToolUse.command: CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'indicators.test.js'; then echo "[test-gate] Running indicator test suite — all 93 tests must pass before merging indicator changes" >&2; fi; exit 0

Stop.description: Persist session branch and timestamp for continuity

SessionStart.description: Restore session context: show last session timestamp and branch
Announce available skills and agents for this project
SessionStart.command: echo '[Order Flow Skills] indicator-parity | pine-script-update | data-validation | security-check | websocket-debugging'; echo '[Order Flow Agents] trading-logic-reviewer | silent-failure-hunter | planner | code-reviewer | refactor-cleaner'; exit 0
